subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received. Praise be to God that thou didst observe in London that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید الحمد لله در لندن ملاحظه فرمودید که آنچه در
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @predictions and prophecies, @growth of the Cause, @consolation and comfort
